title: Lyftosaurus' KitKat's
description: A mod that adds KitKat's to Minecraft!
body:
This is a Minecraft Mod for Forge 1.20-1.20.6 and 1.16.5 that adds a new craftable KitKat food in both wrapped and unwrapped variants.

# Wrapped KitKat
## Crafting

Craftable via a shape similar to TNT's crafting recipe, consisting of 4 Cocoa Beans and 5 Red Dye, resulting in 1 Wrapped KitKat.

![Wrapped KitKat Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9214a8efc2cf4fe0c9b1351db445b0402af9e66.png)

## Effects

Consuming a Wrapped KitKat give's no saturation and gives the player Hunger II and Poison for 5 seconds due to the ingested plastic.

## Spawning

Wrapped KitKat's can be found naturally spawning in dungeon chests in groups of up to 3.



# Unwrapped KitKat
## Crafting

Craftable via putting an unwrapped KitKat in any crafting grid, resulting in 1 unwrapped KitKat; or it can be crafted via putting 1 KitKat Wrapper and 4 KitKat Bars into a Crafting Table.

![Unwrapped KitKat Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efe005a6444f37fdd8175ee795d260d2be52b3f9.png)

![Unwrapped KitKat Alternative Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd900f3129da333cf435c676867845fb1553f36_0.webp)

## Effects

Consuming an Unwrapped KitKat fills 4 hunger bars and 8 saturation and gives the player Resistance II and Speed for 5 seconds.



# KitKat Bar
## Crafting

Craftable via putting an unwrapped KitKat in any crafting grid, resulting in 4 KitKat Bars.

![KitKat Bar Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29584955184677dd77242532a16e27399153a96c.png)

## Effects

Consuming a KitKat Bar fills 1 hunger bar and 2 saturation and gives the play Resistance II and Speed for 1/4th the amount of time as the Unwrapped KitKat.



# Moldy KitKat
## Effects

Consuming a Moldy Kitkat results in Poison II and Hunger III for 10 seconds, and Nausea, Weakness, and Slowness for 5 seconds.

## Spawning

Moldy KitKat's can be found naturally spawning in dungeon chests in groups of up to 5.



# KitKat Wrapper
## Obtaining

The KitKat Wrapper is now obtained whenever the player consumes an Unwrapped KitKat.

## Crafting

The KitKat Wrapper can be crafted as a byproduct of crafting the KitKat Bars.



# KInfiniteKat
## Crafting

Craftable via putting an Unwrapped KitKat in the center of a crafting table grid, with 2 Dragon's Breath on the top and bottom, 2 Nether Stars on either side, and 4 Netherite Scrap in each corner.

![KInfiniteKat Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dba80b17c0a085edd7337ecde1f9985ede53789a.png)

## Effects

Consuming an KInfiniteKat fills 4 hunger bars and 8 saturation and gives the player Resistance II and Speed for 5 seconds, same as the Unwrapped KitKat; where the difference lies is that the KInfiniteKat, once crafted or obtained, can be eaten an unlimited number of times without being consumed. The KInfiniteKat has 4 charges, and cannot be eaten once it reaches 0 charges, however it is constantly recharging, taking 10 seconds to recharge each charge, or 40 seconds in total to recharge fully to 4 charges from 0 charges.

![KInfiniteKat Charges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ff69c3aed02354bc3da857b698aaf4dd3101fcf.png)
